title: Kairegai Polathan Kadhal Song Lyrics Ninaithadhu Yaaro
stanzas:
Kairegai Pola Thaan Kadhal Song Lyrics Ninaithadhu Yaaro
#Chinmayi

Kairegai polathaan kadhal
endrum azhiyaadhe endrum
nam nenjil

kann imai polathaan kadhal
endrum vilagaadhe
anbe nam kannil.

mezhugaagave nenjam nenjam
medhuvaagave urugum konjam
sila sollaadha sogangal
sugamaagum, idhamaagum

yedho baaram
idhayam sumandhaal
un nenjil saindhu
azhave ninaithaen

Kairegai polathaan kadhal
endrum azhiyaadhe endrum
nam nenjil

unnai ezhudhum kavidhai
adhile kadaisi varthai
naanaai iruppen

unnai suttri kanavaai
varuven
nee vendaam endraal
kalaidhe viduven

Kairegai polathaan kadhal
endrum azhiyaadhe endrum
nam nenjil

kann imai polathaan kadhal
endrum vilagaadhe
anbe nam kannil.

mezhugaagave nenjam nenjam
medhuvaagave urugum konjam
sila sollaadha sogangal
sugamaagum, idhamaagum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kairegai Polathan Kadhal?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

Who is the singer of this song?

Chinmayi is the singer of this beautiful melody.

What is the context of the song in the movie Ninaithadhu Yaaro?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the deep emotional connection between the characters.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kairegai Polathan Kadhal from the movie Ninaithadhu Yaaro is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Chinmayi, the song's soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics evoke deep emotions. It portrays the tender moments shared between lovers, making it perfect for romantic occasions. The melody's gentle flow and emotional depth make it a memorable addition to any playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soothing melody of Kairegai Polathan Kadhal from the movie Ninaithadhu Yaaro, beautifully rendered by Chinmayi. This romantic track captures the essence of love with its heartfelt lyrics and gentle tune. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable song.
stanzaMeanings: Love is like a fingerprint, it never fades from our hearts.
Love is like an eyelid, it never leaves our eyes, my dear.
The heart melts slowly like wax, some unspoken sorrows become sweet and meaningful.
Even when a bird sees me and flies away, I think of you.
From somewhere, you might think of me too, I think of you every day.
If my heart carries a burden, I think of crying in your heart.
I thought all memories would become real.
I thought of giving my life for you one day.
Love is like a fingerprint, it never fades from our hearts.
When your eyes fill with tears, I will wipe them away with the wind's fingers.
In the poem I write about you, I will be the last word.
I will come around you like a dream, if you say no, I will leave.
Even if we part, I will stay without leaving your memory.
Even if I die, I will remain unknown to you forever.
Love is like a fingerprint, it never fades from our hearts.
Love is like an eyelid, it never leaves our eyes, my dear.
The heart melts slowly like wax, some unspoken sorrows become sweet and meaningful.
